title: Birthday
desc: A nurse at a home for the elderly is up to no good, but has the tables turned on her.

title: Bangkok Barcelona On Foot
desc: A heartwarming documentary. Lluis and Jenn discuss their epic journey where they walked over 16,000 km, meeting welcoming and wonderful strangers and locales.

title: Hussain
desc: A moving drama. An office peon yearns to express himself through painting but finds his creativity is thwarted by everyday life.

title: Madhavi
desc: An Indian divorcée confronts her violent past at a lunch with old friends, leading her withdrawn daughter to finally see her strength.

title: The Audition
desc: An actor, waiting for an audition, is approached by a boy who begins to ask him for information. Among strange questions and ambiguous answers, the discussion takes an uncertain turn.

title: Seven Feet
desc: This is Film - Fantasy Category.

title: Sundarvan Ki Sundari
desc: This is Film - Comedy Category.

title: Aai Am Single
desc: A young man sacrifices his personal life to look after his single mother. However, a new revelation casts a different light on their relationship.

title: Daud
desc: A boy, born from tragedy, faces fears to complete his father's impossible mountain climb.

title: Tiny Matters
desc: When a girl walks out of her house, objects come to life.

title: The Indestructibles
desc: East Germany, 1986. When her sisters flees to West Berlin, a young East German woman is faced with the decision between her family and her own safety.

title: One Last High
desc: An addict has plans to leave town with her girlfriend to live a healthier life but the reality of her addiction affects everything and everyone around her when she thinks she can have one last high.

title: Fireflies - Children Of The Shore
desc: When two children play make-believe games across a stark landscape, they act out a few imaginary grown-up situations before the harsh reality of their legal status is realised.

title: Stingray
desc: Kurt visits his local pet shop to buy a new fish. Here he runs into a young teacher named Lucy and after an argument with a resident stingray decides to ask her out on a date.

title: The Place We Go to Hide
desc: Unaware that they continually fall for each other in their sleep, two sleepwalkers check into the same hotel.

title: Silent Treatment
desc: A man and a woman become interested in each other when they meet in a hospital. As they start interacting through gestures and scribbles, the man discovers that his new friend is aurally impaired.

title: Freeze-Frame
desc: A brave young woman is travelling from Shanghai to London on a top secret mission. She faces unexpected problems when she confuses her bag with a young photographer.

title: Isabel
desc: An estranged couple are brought back together for their daughter's wedding, but the unavoidable presence of their past reopens old wounds, allowing historic mistakes to be renewed.

title: Blue & Malone: Impossible Cases
desc: Berta returns to the theatre her grandmother used to take her to the night before it's demolition.

title: Blue & Malone, Imaginary Detectives
desc: This is Film - Animation Category.

title: Gratification
desc: Alfonso, a workaholic, decides to make his son's birthday special by buying him a special gift. However, numerous complications help him learn the meaning of love.

title: Baatein
desc: Jeet, a documentary filmmaker, visits his deceased friend Milind's mother, Mrs. Deshpande, and also meets Milind's cousin, Tulika. The trio strikes a bond as they share their deepest fears.

title: Madat
desc: A poor old man's life changes drastically one day. He then devises the most humane way to both help his family and punish his assailant non-violently.

title: Ghazaal
desc: An award-winning drama. A teenage refugee scrapes by in a settlement camp by selling items and clothes but she becomes increasingly desperate when she receives her period.

title: Connie
desc: Dolly Diggs suffers from stage fright, and plans to become a ventriloquist to overcome her fear.

title: The Physics of Sorrow
desc: A man reflects on the different stages of his melancholic life. He tries to make sense of the unpredictable journey of life.

title: The Youth in Us
desc: A young couple confront a painful future by looking to the past.

title: Delayed
desc: While waiting to board a plane to Switzerland, a fugitive executive finds that someone -- or something -- is stalking him.

title: The Forgotten Children
desc: The owners of a foster care home wake up to discover that one of the girls under their care has disappeared from the house.

title: A Night At The Mortuary
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: The Bag
desc: A look at the life of people who live in a world full of chaos, where truth and falsehood are mixed together and people cannot find a meaning to their life.

title: Birthday
desc: A nurse at a home for the elderly is up to no good, but has the tables turned on her.

title: Election Night
desc: A politician's family waits for the last 350 votes to be counted, which rattles the family into a comic whirlwind of wild theories, long-held secrets, and a revelation that nobody saw coming.

title: Stop The Buzz, Aldrin!
desc: When the members of the 'Almost Famous' group gather at a ruin pub, an evening filled with rants, laughter and chaos follows.

title: On Becoming a Man
desc: A shy boy faces challenges with his quirky family as he prepares for his Bar Mitzvah, searching for his own identity and voice.

title: Chintaa mani
desc: The idea of a successful future beckons three friends to explore an enchanted stone. However, when the talisman's true abilities are revealed, the boys must break free from an alternate dimension.

title: Garden Party
desc: In a deserted house, a group of amphibians explore their surroundings and follow their primal instincts. What happened to the owner of the house? Why are there bullet holes in the window?

title: Harvie Krumpet
desc: Despite a life filled with bad luck, the ever-optimistic Harvie lives his own way and enjoys the small things life has to offer.

title: Wild Life
desc: An Englishman tries to become a rancher on the Canadian frontier in 1909, but he is singularly unsuited to it. His letters home are much sunnier than the reality.

title: Animal Behaviour
desc: Five animals meet regularly to share their problems in group therapy sessions led by Dr Clement, a canine psychotherapist.

title: Middle Watch
desc: A shattering encounter threatens to tip the balance of sailor's delicate state of mind.

title: My Nephew Emmett
desc: At 2:30 a.m. on Aug. 28, 1955, in the most racially divided state in the country, 64-year-old Mose Wright tries to protect his 14-year-old nephew Emmett Till from two racists who are out for blood.

title: The Suitcase
desc: The ordinary life of Joe, a baggage handler based in an airport in Boston, is turned upside down when he steals a suitcase containing terrorist plans.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: All Is Well
desc: This short documentary has a look at the world of 'Well of Death', at the life of the bikers in their world of brazen.

title: Cuerpo anima
desc: Exploring and exposing the life and experiences of Sergio Hernández, a famous Chilean actor, through the language of 2D frame-by-frame animation with acrylic paintings, portrayed on his own body.

title: Zipped
desc: This is Film - Short Film Category.

title: Sarah's Bag
desc: Featuring the story of Sarah Beydoun, the woman responsible for providing employment for hundreds of women, when the rest of her country would not.

title: Father
desc: During her grandfather's funeral, Karla, an optimistic young girl, tries to understand the concept of heaven and hell. But her world view shatters due to her father's bitter comments.

title: Just in Case
desc: A woman with bipolar disorder tries to explain her daily struggles to her father over a cup of coffee.

title: Piove
desc: Tony Bianchi, a successful doctor, is forced to rethink the purpose of his life after meeting and conversing with several ordinary people.

title: Last Of The Wild
desc: A thought-provoking documentary. Game of Thrones star Kristofer Hivju and adventurer Fredrik Strang explore the Whanganui River, the first river to achieve personhood.

title: Baluji
desc: The filmmaker charts the life and music of legendary blind sitar player Baluji Shrivastav.
